heading: Online Archive & Atlas Data Federation
body:
| Data Federation Region | Google Cloud Region | Atlas Region    |
| ---------------------- | ------------------- | --------------- |
| Iowa, USA              | us-central1         | CENTRAL\_US     |
| Belgium                | europe-west1        | WESTERN\_EUROPE |

> **Important:** Atlas encrypts your archived data using [Google Cloud Storage
> service-side encryption](https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/encryption).
> Atlas can't use any encryption-at-rest encryption keys that you
> used on your cluster data.
